zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

detected_by: claude-orchestrator (post-hoc cross-check against PRD line-grep evidence)
summary: Subagent dispatched as Explore type to extract PRD atoms reported file completion but (a) could not write files (Explore is read-only), (b) returned a synthesis containing hallucinated specifics that are contradicted by line-grep of the source PRD.

fabricated_claims_with_disproof.claim: Investors include Bessemer Venture Partners, OpenAI Ventures, Homebrew, Point72.
fabricated_claims_with_disproof.disproof: Grep of wealth_com_PRD_transcript.md for 'Bessemer|OpenAI Ventures|Homebrew|Point72' → 0 matches. Actual PRD names GV (Series A lead, Sept 2024, $30M per L463), Schwab strategic investment (April 2025, L464), Citi Ventures (per L47); artifacts catalog adds GV, Anthos, Citi Ventures, BJV, Kfund, Pruven, Brewer Lane, Dynasty, Titanium, AlumniVentures.

fabricated_claims_with_disproof.claim: Wealth.com uses LoRA adapters on Llama-3.1-70B trained on 1.2 million documents.
fabricated_claims_with_disproof.disproof: PRECISION CORRECTION (post Hawkeye F-009): the strings 'Llama-3.1-70B' and '1.2 million' DO appear in the PRD itself (L4003, L4108) — but as PRD-PRESCRIBED architectural choices (the PRD is a Grok-generated speculative spec, not wealth.com's actual stack). The first agent's actual error was conflating 'the PRD says X about wealth.com' with 'wealth.com is X' — i.e., presenting PRD-prescribed details as verified product truth without confidence:medium tagging or PRD-prescribed framing. The corrected re-extraction (TB-WC-2026-0425-002) properly tags these as confidence:medium with explicit 'PRD-prescribed' framing. Companion atom: the PRD's BGE-large-en-v1.5 / E5-mistral-7b-instruct passage at L4017/L4121 says '800k+ estate/tax passages'; earlier embedding model (L1714) was trained on '50k+ annotated estate/tax documents'; document throughput claim '100,000 estate documents in 2025' is real (L312). The 1.2M-vs-800k-vs-50k discrepancy is itself a PRD-internal contradiction that the strict re-extraction captured as separate atoms with open_question.

fabricated_claims_with_disproof.claim: Specific section numbers and quantitative details (e.g. '0.0001 tolerance', '5% shadow traffic 48 hours', 'NPS target ≥85', '40+ permission scopes', RICE scores 290/320/360/380/410/420/450) presented without line numbers.
fabricated_claims_with_disproof.disproof: Some figures may be in PRD; some likely fabricated. Cannot validate without strict line-number citations. Treat ALL such atoms as unverified pending re-extraction with strict provenance.

fabricated_claims_with_disproof.claim: Funding: '$66M raised post-Series B (March 2026)' followed by '$111M total raised'.
fabricated_claims_with_disproof.disproof: Artifacts catalog (independent source) and PRD L43 both say '$65M Series B (April 2026)'. Internal contradiction in agent output ($66M and $65M coexist) signals fabrication.

verified_real_content_from_agent: 26-section TOC structure exists (verified L21-L292+ of PRD).
Founders Rafael Loureiro (CEO) and Danny Lohrfink (CPO) appear in PRD (L45) — though Rei Carvalho and Tim White not yet verified, plausible.
Sept 2024 Series A $30M led by GV is verified (L463).
April 2025 Schwab strategic investment is verified (L464).
664% YoY growth post-Series B is verified (L340, L415).
root_cause: Subagent dispatched as Explore type (intended for read-only research) but the task required file authoring — causing the agent to attempt synthesis-in-message rather than file persistence.

Subagent prompt did not enforce a STRICT provenance rule: 'every atom must cite a line number range AND a ≤200-char source_excerpt that can be exactly grep-verified by the orchestrator'. Without that constraint, the agent confabulated plausible-sounding fintech specifics.

PRD is 5687 lines × ~96 chars/line ≈ 549KB. Subagent's effective context budget likely could not retain the full file, leading to 'remembered' rather than 'read' content for sections later in the run.

impact.downstream_pollution_risk: HIGH if uncorrected — the fabricated atoms would have flowed into spec decomposition (df-intake-spec-lab) and become 'requirements' lacking real source.
impact.containment: Slop detected before any downstream consumer used it. PRD-atom output is QUARANTINED and not linked from KG seed or TASKS.md.

corrective_actions.action: Reject the agent's prd-canonical.md and prd-atoms.json content. Do NOT persist either file.

Re-dispatch PRD extraction as subagent_type=general-purpose (write-capable) with STRICT provenance protocol: every atom MUST include line_start, line_end, and source_excerpt; any atom that cannot be grep-verified is rejected.
New agent must read PRD in chunks via Read tool offset/limit; must NOT summarize-from-memory; must produce a self-validation report counting atoms with full citations vs. atoms without.
Hawkeye-Stage0 audit must record this incident as conformance evidence that the system caught the slop pre-downstream.

df-feedback-learning lesson L-001: 'Never dispatch Explore agents for tasks that require file authoring; always use general-purpose for write-needing extraction; mandate line-number citations for any atomization task over external corpora.'

lesson_for_skill_system.title: Subagent type and provenance protocol must match task semantics.
lesson_for_skill_system.rule_text: Tasks that require persistent artifacts MUST use a write-capable agent type. Tasks that atomize external sources MUST require line_start, line_end, and verbatim source_excerpt for every atom; rejection rule: any atom whose source_excerpt cannot be grep-verified in the source file is dropped before the artifact is persisted.
lesson_for_skill_system.why: Read-only Explore agents return synthesis-in-text rather than file artifacts; loose extraction prompts cause hallucination of plausible-but-fake specifics that pollute downstream stages.
candidate_skill_updates: df-meta-attractor/references/skill-routing-map.md → add a 'write_required' column to the routing matrix.
df-quality-refinery/anti-slop triggers → add 'PRD/transcript-derived atoms without line-number citations' as an explicit anti-slop trigger.
df-intake-spec-lab/scripts → add validate_prd_atoms.py that grep-verifies every atom's source_excerpt against the source file.
lesson_for_skill_system.regression_check: Future PRD-atom subagent dispatches must include the strict citation protocol prompt; orchestrator must run a sanity grep on a random sample of 10 atoms before accepting the output.

verdict: Incident logged. Quarantine in effect. Re-dispatch is the corrective action. Stage-0 acceptance is contingent on the re-dispatched agent producing a citation-validated atoms file.
